Defendant Bd Antiques S.F., Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar May-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom:
Aleshia White, Esq., 408-286-5800, appearing for Syed Ali, Plaintiff
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Bd Antiques S.F., Inc.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation, DENIED. Judgment against Steven Shane Brown on file. BD Antiques SF, Inc failed to obtain counsel, having been provided additional time to do so. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

DEFENDANT BD ANTIQUEST S.F., INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION is CONTINUED to May 13, 2022 to allow Defendant BD Antiques SF, Inc. an opportunity to obtain counsel. (See Merco Constr. Engineers, Inc. v. Municipal Court (1978) 21 Cal.3d 724, 729-730.)
